name: Lelystad (Netherlands)
description: A yellow field with a stepped blue cross, charged at the centre with a white fleur-de-lis on a blue square.
history: Flag of the municipality of Lelystad, the capital of the province of Flevoland, named after the engineer Cornelis Lely. The fleur-de-lis is a canting reference to his name (lelie = lily).

features.role: a blue square at the centre
a white fleur-de-lis canting on the name Lely
